titleStmt.title: SII 26.512: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 512. (A.R. No. 485 of 1909.) ŚŌḺAPURAM, SIVAGANGA TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the verandah round the same shrine.

p.hi: Tribhº Koṉēriṉmaikoṇḍān: S. 1[·]44 and 5th Year, Chittirai.

summary.p: It records a gift of land, made by the king, to the temple of the god Vikramapāṇḍīśvaramuḍaiyanāyaṉār at Śōḻapuram in Āṉmā-nāḍu, to provide for the festival, instituted in the temple, called Avaṉivendarāmaṉ-sandhi after the king's name. It is stated that the land comprised the village Āḷūr alias Avaṉipradānanallūr in Śakara-nāḍu, and the land, situated in Kānchī and Mēlai Āḷūr of the same paṟṟu and belonging to a certain Śīyagaṅganārāyaṇadēvar. It is further stated that these lands yielded upto the month of Paṅguṉi of the 5th year in the reign of the king an income of 160 poṉ. Of this amount a sum of 60 poṉ was gifted to the temple of the god Aḻagapāṇḍīśvaramuḍaiyanāyiṉār of Nāṅgūr and that the balance of 100 poṉ was that which was gifted to the temple in connection with the festival mentioned above from the month of Chittirai in the 5th year of the reign of the king. A long list of taxes and levies that went with the gift is given at the end.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . śakābdam Āyirat tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ koṉeriṉmai koṇṭāṉ Āṉmā nāṭṭu coḻapurattu Uṭaiyār vikramapāṇṭiśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil tāṉattāṟku ṉāyaṉāṟku namperāl kaṭṭiṉa Avaṉiventarāmaṉ cantikku Eḻuntaruḷivit Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭi veñcaṉam Uḷḷiṭṭa
veṇṭum mutalukku nitta niman vaṇṭu mutalukkum Uṭalāka cakaranāṭṭu Āḷurāṉa Avaṉipratānanallūrum Ivvūr paṟṟu kāñciyum melai Āḷūrum kaṇṭuḻavāṉa nilam ciyakaṅkanārāyaṇadevaṟkuk kārāṇmai Āṉa nilamum Uṭpaṭṭa nāṉkellaikku Uṭpaṭṭa nañcai pu(ṉ)ñceyum nattamum nattappāḻum kuḷamum kuḷapparippum toṭṭamum toṭṭak kollaikaḷum kiṇaṟum ma
ramum maṟṟum Eṟpperpaṭṭa ptikaḷil Añcāvatu paṅkuṉi mātavaraiyum Iṉnāyiṉāṟkup paḻantevatāṉam tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam tatriṟaiyilinikki karaipaṭi poṉ nūṟṟaṟupatu Itil nāṅkūr Ināyiṉār Aḻakapāṇṭīśvara- muṭaiyāṟku viṭṭa poṉ Aṟupatu niṅki poṉ nūṟṟukku Āḷūrum Ippaṟṟu kāñciyum cuntarapāṇṭiyatevaṟku 5 vatu cittirai
mātam mutal mutalaṭaṅka I� ntu U
Ittāl varum neṟkaṭamai kuṟuvai taṟiyiṟai taṭṭoli taṭṭārpāṭṭam cekkiṟai maṉaiyiṟai puravari Iṉavari Iṭaivari Erimiṉpāṭṭam kāṇikkai kāttikaippaccai Ānirai pañcupili Olai Eḻut[tu ccappeṟu Ilāñciṉaippeṟu koṟṟilakkai kaṭaikkūṭṭu Ilakkai Āḷttevai Āṇṭeḻuttu tevai Āṉaiccālai kutiraipanti veṭṭipāṭṭam kāl tevai karaittevai maṟṟum Eṟperpaṭṭa
Iṟaikaḷum Upātikaḷum Iṉnāḷ mutal variyilār kaṇakkilum kaḻikkac coṉṉom Ippaṭikku Ivolai piṭipāṭāka koṇṭu nāṉkellai yilum tiruccūlattāpaṉamum paṇṇi candrādityavaraiyum cellak kallilum cempilum veṭṭik koḷka .
Digital edition of SII 26.512 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
